---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Grinta
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this feature to work?

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives have you considered?

## Additional Context

- Would you be willing to implement this feature?
- Is this blocking your usage of Grinta?
- Any relevant examples from other tools?

## Example Usage

If applicable, show how you'd use this feature:

```python
# Example code
```

or

```text
Example user interaction
```
